languages.text: "Вздумали напугать меня? Страх мне не дозволен. Какие бы сети ни расставил Себериан, я разорву их. Меня ведет Бог-Император, и Его воля сильнее любой западни".

traits.locale_text: "Вздумали напугать меня? Страх мне не дозволен. Какие бы сети ни расставил Себериан, я разорву их. Меня ведет Бог-Император, и Его воля сильнее любой западни".

languages.text: "Are you trying to make me afraid? I am not permitted to fear. Whatever nets Seberian has set, I will break them. The God-Emperor leads me, and His will is stronger than any snare."
languages.original_text: "Вздумали напугать меня? Страх мне не дозволен. Какие бы сети ни расставил Себериан, я разорву их. Меня ведет Бог-Император, и Его воля сильнее любой западни".

traits.locale_text: "Are you trying to make me afraid? I am not permitted to fear. Whatever nets Seberian has set, I will break them. The God-Emperor leads me, and His will is stronger than any snare."
"Are you trying to make me afraid? I am not permitted to fear. Whatever nets Seberian has set, I will break them. The God-Emperor leads me, and His will is stronger than any snare."
"Are you trying to make me afraid? I am not permitted to fear. Whatever nets Seberian has set, I will break them. The God-Emperor leads me, and His will is stronger than any snare."

languages.text: “你是想吓唬我吗？我的身份不允许我畏惧。无论塞贝里安布下什么陷阱，我都会将其粉碎。神皇指引着我，祂的意志凌驾于一切陷阱之上。”
languages.original_text: "Are you trying to make me afraid? I am not permitted to fear. Whatever nets Seberian has set, I will break them. The God-Emperor leads me, and His will is stronger than any snare."

traits.locale_text: “你是想吓唬我吗？我的身份不允许我畏惧。无论塞贝里安布下什么陷阱，我都会将其粉碎。神皇指引着我，祂的意志凌驾于一切陷阱之上。”

languages.text: « Vous cherchez à me faire peur ? Un tel sentiment est incompatible avec ma fonction. Quels que soient les filets que Seberian a tendus, je les détruirai. L'Empereur-Dieu me guide, et Sa volonté triomphe des pièges les plus retors. »
languages.original_text: "Are you trying to make me afraid? I am not permitted to fear. Whatever nets Seberian has set, I will break them. The God-Emperor leads me, and His will is stronger than any snare."

traits.locale_text: « Vous cherchez à me faire peur ? Un tel sentiment est incompatible avec ma fonction. Quels que soient les filets que Seberian a tendus, je les détruirai. L'Empereur-Dieu me guide, et Sa volonté triomphe des pièges les plus retors. »

languages.text: "Beni korkutmaya mı çalışıyorsunuz? Korkmama izin yok. Seberian'ın kurduğu her bir ağı parçalayacağım. Tanrı İmparator bana yol gösteriyor. O'nun iradesi, her türlü tuzaktan daha güçlüdür."
languages.original_text: "Are you trying to make me afraid? I am not permitted to fear. Whatever nets Seberian has set, I will break them. The God-Emperor leads me, and His will is stronger than any snare."

traits.locale_text: "Beni korkutmaya mı çalışıyorsunuz? Korkmama izin yok. Seberian'ın kurduğu her bir ağı parçalayacağım. Tanrı İmparator bana yol gösteriyor. O'nun iradesi, her türlü tuzaktan daha güçlüdür."

languages.text: «¿Pretende asustarme? El miedo es ajeno a mí. Romperé toda red que Seberian haya tendido. El Dios Emperador me guía, y Su voluntad es más fuerte que ninguna trampa».
languages.original_text: "Are you trying to make me afraid? I am not permitted to fear. Whatever nets Seberian has set, I will break them. The God-Emperor leads me, and His will is stronger than any snare."

traits.locale_text: «¿Pretende asustarme? El miedo es ajeno a mí. Romperé toda red que Seberian haya tendido. El Dios Emperador me guía, y Su voluntad es más fuerte que ninguna trampa».

languages.text: "Wollt Ihr mir etwa Angst machen? Ich kenne keine Furcht. Egal, welches Netz Seberian gesponnen hat, ich werde es zerreißen. Der Gottimperator führt mich, und Sein Wille ist stärker als jede Falle."
languages.original_text: "Are you trying to make me afraid? I am not permitted to fear. Whatever nets Seberian has set, I will break them. The God-Emperor leads me, and His will is stronger than any snare."

traits.locale_text: "Wollt Ihr mir etwa Angst machen? Ich kenne keine Furcht. Egal, welches Netz Seberian gesponnen hat, ich werde es zerreißen. Der Gottimperator führt mich, und Sein Wille ist stärker als jede Falle."

languages.text: 「私を恐がらせようとしているのですか？私は恐れることを許されていません。シベリアが張ったどんな罠であろうと、私はそれを破ります。神皇帝が私を導き、彼の意志はどんな罠よりも強いです。」
languages.original_text: "Are you trying to make me afraid? I am not permitted to fear. Whatever nets Seberian has set, I will break them. The God-Emperor leads me, and His will is stronger than any snare."

traits.locale_text: 「私を恐がらせようとしているのですか？私は恐れることを許されていません。シベリアが張ったどんな罠であろうと、私はそれを破ります。神皇帝が私を導き、彼の意志はどんな罠よりも強いです。」
